calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Dec-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Matthew D. Miyaki, Judgment Debtor in Propria Persona

No other appearance. Ruling as follows:
1- The Claim Of Exemption is denied. Levying officer shall release $250 of funds being held to the judgment creditor, and the balance to the judgment debtor.
2- Thje Levying officer shall withheld $25.00 per pay period until judgment is satisfied or further court order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
